title: ModelDuel evidence visualizers
description: A lightweight hero comparison and two deterministic scientific 3D views that keep learner claims, scientific models, and verified observations visually distinct.

accessibility.canvasLabel: Interactive comparison of a learner model, a scientific model, and the evidence that distinguishes them
accessibility.instructions: Use the three named view buttons to focus the learner claim, scientific model, or verified evidence. The adjacent text carries the complete meaning when 3D is unavailable.
accessibility.textSummary: Two proposed models run under one shared test. The learner model uses an Earth-shadow claim, the scientific model uses sunlight and viewing angle, and the verified half-lit Moon observation distinguishes them.

deployment.contentSecurityPolicy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self'; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
